mapper.select: select * from serviceEntity where isShow = 1 ORDER by sortID;
mapper.insert: insert into serviceEntity (title, name, content, img) values (#{title}, #{name}, #{content}, #{img})
mapper.update: update serviceEntity set title = #{title}, name = #{name}, content = #{content}, img = #{img}, updateTime = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}
update serviceEntity set isShow = 0 where id = #{id}
